title: [InstCombine] Convert mem intrinsic with null into a noop

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary mentions both source and destination are covered, but existing tests only show memmove with null source (memmove_null_src), not null destination. This tests the dest pointer path specifically for memmove.

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define void @memmove_null_dest(ptr %src, i64 %len) {
#0:
  memmove ptr null align 1, ptr %src align 1, i64 %len
  ret void
}
=>
define void @memmove_null_dest(ptr %src, i64 %len) {
#0:
  %#1 = icmp eq i64 %len, 0
  assume i1 %#1
  ret void
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors
